leadText: Laser Focus (Japanese: とぎすます Hone) is a non-damaging Normal-type move introduced in Generation VII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Laser Focus causes the user's move to result in a critical hit until the end of the next turn, unless that move's target has Battle Armor , Shell Armor , or is under the effect of Lucky Chant . The effect of Laser Focus can be copied by Psych Up or Transform . If powered up by a Normalium Z into Z-Laser Focus, the user's Attack stat rises by one stage. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Laser Focus cannot be selected in a battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user concentrates intensely. The attack on the next turn always results in a critical hit. S V This move can't be used. It's recommended that this move is forgotten. Once forgotten, this move can't be remembered.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD RT DX You get the Laser Focus condition, making your moves critical hits.
